comment: ML-KEM-768 KAT subset extracted from NIST ACVP test vectors (FIPS 203). Source: https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server/tree/master/gen-val/json-files/ML-KEM-keyGen-FIPS203 and .../ML-KEM-encapDecap-FIPS203 — internalProjection.json files. Retrieved via gh API on 2026-04-26. The NIST upstream provides the cross-language conformance contract for FIPS 203; our wrapper around the `ml-kem` crate must reproduce these wire bytes byte-for-byte.
source: NIST ACVP-Server (master) ML-KEM-keyGen-FIPS203 and ML-KEM-encapDecap-FIPS203 internalProjection.json — first 10 ML-KEM-768 vectors of each
